positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a collection of whimsical, friendly woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl, rabbits) surrounded by abstract bioluminescent flora and curling vines. The style is modern maximalist illustration meets Art Nouveau, using deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with glowing teal and gold accents. The characters should have clean, distinct silhouettes with minimal facial features, focusing on expressive posture and graceful lines. Use a high-contrast, engraved woodcut aesthetic blended with digital glow effects. Ideal for a centerpiece apparel print. Perfect symmetry, central focus, clean lines, solid color blocking.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, text, watermark, logo, typography, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, disfigured, messy, low detail, muddy colors, photorealism, realistic texture, human, celebrity
